title: Vector Operations and Properties

elements.label: Vector Addition
elements.description: Component-wise addition: u + v = (u₁+v₁, u₂+v₂, ..., uₙ+vₙ). Properties: Commutative (u+v=v+u), Associative (u+(v+w)=(u+v)+w), Identity (v+0=v).

elements.label: Scalar Multiplication
elements.description: Multiply each component by scalar c: c·v = (c·v₁, c·v₂, ..., c·vₙ). Properties: Distributive over vector addition (c(u+v)=cu+cv) and scalar addition ((c+d)v=cv+dv).

elements.label: Dot Product
elements.description: Scalar result: u·v = u₁v₁ + u₂v₂ + ... + uₙvₙ. Related to angle: u·v = ||u|| ||v|| cosθ. Properties: Commutative (u·v=v·u), Distributive (u·(v+w)=u·v+u·w).

elements.label: Cross Product (ℝ³)
elements.description: Vector perpendicular to both u and v: u×v = (u₂v₃-u₃v₂, u₃v₁-u₁v₃, u₁v₂-u₂v₁). Magnitude equals area of parallelogram: ||u×v|| = ||u|| ||v|| |sinθ|.

elements.label: Form Linear Combinations
elements.description: Addition and scalar multiplication form basis for linear combinations: c₁v₁ + c₂v₂ + ... + cₙvₙ.

elements.label: Orthogonality & Geometry
elements.description: Dot product defines perpendicularity (u·v=0), cross product generates orthogonal vectors and measures area/volume in 3D space.

svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Vector Operations and Properties</text>

  <!-- Vector Addition -->
  <line x1="50" y1="80" x2="120" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="120" y1="120" x2="190" y2="80" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="50" y1="80" x2="190" y2="80" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="85" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="155" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="120" y="65" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    v + w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="30" y="130" width="180" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Vector Addition
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Scalar Multiplication -->
  <line x1="270" y1="80" x2="350" y2="120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="270" y1="120" x2="350" y2="80" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="310" y="105" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="310" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    2v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="250" y="130" width="140" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Scalar Multiplication
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Dot Product -->
  <line x1="100" y1="200" x2="180" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="100" y1="240" x2="180" y2="240" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="140" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="140" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="80" y="260" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="140" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Dot Product: v·w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Cross Product -->
  <line x1="280" y1="200" x2="360" y2="200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="280" y1="240" x2="360" y2="240" stroke="#2196F3" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <line x1="320" y1="220" x2="320" y2="300" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </line>
  <text x="320" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    v
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="320" y="255" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#2196F3" opacity="0">
    w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="340" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="#64B5F6" opacity="0">
    v×w
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <rect x="260" y="310" width="120" height="30" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="320" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Cross Product
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
